g.onclick: sendPrompt('What raw data formats does the pipeline accept?')
sendPrompt('What does the data audit report contain?')
g.text: Schema, nulls, duplicates, type mismatches, outliers, distributions

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the deterministic cleaner handle automatically?')
g.text: Remove empty rows · fix dtypes · strip whitespace · dedup

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the agent decide which tool to use?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent handle missing value imputation?')
sendPrompt('What outlier detection methods does the agent use?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent coerce types and normalize values?')
sendPrompt('What complex scenarios go to the Python sandbox?')
sendPrompt('How does token optimisation work in the agent pipeline?')
g.text: Compact audit context · chunk large datasets · cache tool results
